key.name: default-station
key.description: Station used on startup when no CLI override is provided.

key.name: autoplay
key.description: Start playback automatically when the app opens.

key.name: pause-resume-enabled
key.description: Use pause and resume in the main playback control instead of stop.

key.name: stop-instead-pause
key.description: Compatibility key kept for migrating older pause behavior settings.

key.name: discord-enabled
key.description: Enable Discord Rich Presence integration at runtime.
